task_completion.description: Open and read the vendor proposals JSON file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal, file manager, or text editor showing the contents of /home/ga/Documents/vendor_proposals.json with vendor names and quotes visible.

task_completion.description: Create the document with the required sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Word processor window showing text for sections like Executive Summary, Evaluation Methodology, Vendor Profiles, and Recommendation.

task_completion.description: Apply Heading 1 and Heading 2 styles to the document sections.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The formatting toolbar shows 'Heading 1' or 'Heading 2' selected when the cursor is on a section title, or the titles are visibly formatted as distinct headings.

task_completion.description: Create the Weighted Scoring Matrix and Cost Comparison tables.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Word processor showing tables containing the four vendor names (Titanium Edge Tooling, PrecisionCut International, Nordic Carbide Solutions, Summit Tool & Die Works) and their respective quotes.

task_completion.description: Insert an auto-generated Table of Contents at the beginning of the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Table of Contents block at the top of the document, typically with a gray background and dotted leader lines pointing to page numbers.

task_completion.description: Insert page numbers in the document footer.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The footer area of the document is active or visible, containing a page number field.

task_completion.description: Save the document as Avalon_Vendor_Eval_2025.odt in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog showing the filename Avalon_Vendor_Eval_2025.odt in /home/ga/Documents/, or the word processor title bar displaying this filename.

integrity.description: The agent used a GUI word processor (like LibreOffice Writer) to create the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the LibreOffice Writer interface being actively used, rather than a terminal script generating the ODT file.

integrity.description: The Table of Contents and page numbers are actual auto-generated fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The TOC and page numbers should have the characteristic gray field shading in LibreOffice Writer, indicating they are auto-generated and not manually typed text.

integrity.description: Actual table structures are used for the matrices.
integrity.visual_evidence: Table grid lines or table formatting toolbars are visible in the UI, rather than text aligned with spaces or tabs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The input data is located at /home/ga/Documents/vendor_proposals.json. The report must evaluate four vendors: Titanium Edge Tooling (quote: 587,400), PrecisionCut International (quote: 542,800), Nordic Carbide Solutions (quote: 611,200), and Summit Tool & Die Works (quote: 498,600). The final document must be saved as /home/ga/Documents/Avalon_Vendor_Eval_2025.odt. The document structure requires an auto-generated Table of Contents, page numbers in the footer, at least 6 Heading 1 sections, at least 8 Heading 2 subsections, and at least 4 tables.
